[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000111 4
1 1000110 3
2 0101101 4
3 0110011 4
4 0110001 3
5 1111100 5
6 0010101 3
7 1100111 5

70 07 0111111 6
